germlinevaR 0.99.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • germlinevaR walkthrough
  • Changelog

germlinevaR — updated files (2026-06-26 session)

Drop-in replacement files for this iteration’s audit-fix pass. Each path below mirrors its location in the package source tree — copy each into the same relative path in your local germlinevaR/ repo, then commit and push.

Apart from .Rbuildignore and the newly created tests/, BIOC_COVER_LETTER.md, and the three regenerated man/*.Rd, the rest are existing files with content edits only (no renames, no deletes).

File-by-file change summary

Path Status Edit
DESCRIPTION modified Added Thiago’s ORCID 0000-0003-4531-9616; dropped Felipe’s empty comment = c(ORCID = "") slot.
BIOC_COVER_LETTER.md new Documentation for the Bioconductor reviewer covering deferred items (function lengths, line length, indentation). Excluded from the tarball via .Rbuildignore — sits at the repo root for the reviewer to find.
.Rbuildignore new Excludes BIOC_COVER_LETTER.md, CHANGES.md, and common dev/pkgdown artifacts from the built tarball.
R/gvr_filter.R modified Added 2 × # why: comments above each suppressWarnings() call. No behaviour change.
R/gvr_genepos_plot.R modified Added 5 × # why: comments + \dontrun{ → \donttest{ in the example block. <<- → new.env() slot in .gvr_genepos_http_get_retry() (line 91).
R/gvr_lollipop.R modified Added 11 × # why: comments. <<- → new.env() slot in .gvr_http_get_retry() (line 19).
R/gvr_summary.R modified Added 9 × # why: comments. <<- → new.env() slot in the .make_new_page() closure (line 1097).
R/read.gvr.R modified Added 10 × # why: comments. No behaviour change.
R/read.gvr.dual.R modified Added 1 × # why: comment + \dontrun{ → \donttest{ in the example block.
R/read.gvr.snpeff.R modified Added 7 × # why: comments + \dontrun{ → \donttest{ in the example block.
man/gvr_genepos.plot.Rd regenerated Regenerated by roxygen2::roxygenise(".") after the \dontrun{ → \donttest{ change.
man/read.gvr.dual.Rd regenerated Same — regenerated after roxygen update.
man/read.gvr.snpeff.Rd regenerated Same — regenerated after roxygen update.
tests/testthat.R new testthat harness for R CMD check.
tests/testthat/test-smoke.R new Three smoke tests against the shipped 62-variant fixture: read.gvr() shape (62 × 116), gvr_filter() reduction (62 → 7), gvr_novel() invariant. All 11 expectations pass locally.

How to apply 

cd /path/to/your/germlinevaR
# Replace DESCRIPTION
cp /downloaded/germlinevaR_updated_files/DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION
# Replace 7 R files
cp /downloaded/germlinevaR_updated_files/R/*.R R/
# Replace 3 .Rd files (regenerate the rest yourself with roxygen if needed)
cp /downloaded/germlinevaR_updated_files/man/*.Rd man/
# Add 3 new files
mkdir -p tests/testthat
cp /downloaded/germlinevaR_updated_files/tests/testthat.R          tests/testthat.R
cp /downloaded/germlinevaR_updated_files/tests/testthat/test-smoke.R tests/testthat/test-smoke.R
cp /downloaded/germlinevaR_updated_files/BIOC_COVER_LETTER.md      BIOC_COVER_LETTER.md
cp /downloaded/germlinevaR_updated_files/.Rbuildignore             .Rbuildignore

# Verify locally — these should all pass / produce only the expected NOTES
Rscript -e 'roxygen2::roxygenise(".")'
R CMD build .
R CMD check --no-manual germlinevaR_0.99.0.tar.gz
Rscript -e 'BiocCheck::BiocCheck("germlinevaR_0.99.0.tar.gz")'

# Then commit and push
git add DESCRIPTION BIOC_COVER_LETTER.md .Rbuildignore R/ man/ tests/
git commit -m "Add ORCID; add smoke tests; annotate suppressWarnings; fix dontrun→donttest"
git push origin main

Validation summary

Check Result
All 7 R files parse via parse() OK
45 / 45 suppress* sites have # why: comment immediately above OK
0 / 14 man pages now use \dontrun{} (all on \donttest{}) OK
testthat::test_dir("tests/testthat") 11 expectations, 0 failures
R CMD build OK — germlinevaR_0.99.0.tar.gz (892,467 bytes)
R CMD check --no-manual 1 NOTE (sandbox-only svglite missing — will not appear on Bioc CI)
BiocCheck::BiocCheck() 1 ERROR / 0 WARNINGS / 7 NOTES

The 1 ERROR is Bioconductor Support Site registration — this is a user action (register thiago-loreto@hotmail.com at https://support.bioconductor.org/accounts/signup/).

The 7 remaining NOTES are all documented in BIOC_COVER_LETTER.md and are either (a) acknowledged deferrals (function lengths, line length, indentation), (b) annotated by-design choices (suppressWarnings), or (c) auto-suggester false positives (recommended biocViews). None are blockers under Bioconductor’s published submission criteria.

Bioconductor NOTE-removal series — Item 1 of 7: <<- super-assignment

The latest iteration removes BiocCheck’s Avoid '<<-' if possible (found 3 times) NOTE by refactoring all three flagged sites to a local new.env(parent = emptyenv()) slot — the same idiom the codebase already uses elsewhere. Sites refactored:

  • R/gvr_genepos_plot.R:91 (.gvr_genepos_http_get_retry()) — last_err <<- e inside tryCatch(httr::GET(...))
  • R/gvr_lollipop.R:19 (.gvr_http_get_retry()) — identical retry pattern
  • R/gvr_summary.R:1097 (.make_new_page() closure) — first <<- FALSE flag

Verified end-to-end: 11/11 testthat expectations pass; read.gvr(), gvr_filter(), gvr_novel() produce the same shapes on the shipped fixture; gvr_summary(save_pdf = TRUE) emits a 4-page PDF with identical hero content. BiocCheck delta: 8 NOTES → 7 NOTES.
